title: Institution Job Supervisors
description: Information about the supervisors associated with jobs at the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the institution job supervisor.

person.title: Person
person.description: The employee to which the job is associated.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

employer.title: Employer
employer.description: The institution for which the employee works.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Employer.

position.title: Position
position.description: The position associated with the employee.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Position.

department.title: Department
department.description: The department of the institution to which the employee belongs.

supervisors.title: Supervisors
supervisors.description: The supervisors associated with the employee's job.

supervisor.title: Supervisor
supervisor.description: The supervisor for the employee's job.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Supervisor.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of the supervisor for the employee's job (e.g. primary, alternate and orgchart).

supervisorJob.title: Supervisor Job
supervisorJob.description: The institution job associated with the supervisor.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Supervisor Job.
